rationale: The citing paper is an invited methodological synthesis on policy-simulation diagnostics (exogeneity, stability, Lucas critique) and a review of many JMR 1998–2003 articles, while the cited paper is a domain-specific promotion/price-tier empirical study (scanner + experiments). This suggests the citation may be one reviewed example rather than a core methodological source, but the evidence is sparse: only one DOI match is provided and no in-text citation context is available.
